Parkcrest.description: A multi-story residential building with a distinctive curved design is situated along Patterson Avenue in Burnaby, surrounded by trees, with high-rise buildings and a construction crane visible in the background.

Sanctuary.description: A modern multi-story building with a docked marina in front, set against a densely forested hillside.

Pacific Place Landmark.description: A tall, modern glass-clad building with a sharp, rectangular shape dominates the street scene, surrounded by leafless trees and a cloudy sky.

Dunbar.description: A modern multi-story building with large glass windows and a spacious outdoor seating area, illuminated against a dark blue evening sky, located on Dunbar W 38th Avenue in Vancouver.

Westport.description: A multi-story residential building with a warm-toned exterior, surrounded by lush greenery and a well-maintained sidewalk, with a sign displaying "1435 Westport" in Vancouver.

Corbeau By Mosaic.description: A three-story townhouse with beige and brick exterior, blue shutters, and attached garage, situated next to a tree and greenery, with a no parking sign in front.

Greencroft Estate.description: A large, whimsical house with a conical tower, multiple rounded and irregularly shaped windows, and a mix of dark and light exterior materials surrounded by a landscaped garden with a stone pathway.

The Arc.description: A modern, high-rise building with a distinctive archway connecting two sections, featuring curved balconies and a glass exterior, located at the intersection on Nelson Street in Vancouver.

Tennyson Mews.description: A two-story residential building with a light-colored exterior, surrounded by neatly trimmed bushes and a large tree, located on 1855 West 10th Avenue in Vancouver.

Mirabel English Bay.description: A modern multi-story building with glass balconies and large windows overlooks a body of water, with a clear blue sky and distant shoreline in the background.

Winford.description: A tall modern apartment building with glass balconies and a distinctive yellow and blue exterior stands in front of an industrial area and bridge across a river, with a city skyline in the distance under a partly cloudy sky.

Currents At The Water's Edge.description: A modern residential building with glass balconies and large windows overlooks a lush, green area near water, reflecting a contemporary architectural style.

Paris Block.description: The building features a historic stone facade with large windows and decorative columns, adjacent to a modern glass and metal structure, situated along a street with trees and pedestrians.

Olivers Landing - Furry Creek.description: A row of large, multi-story beachfront houses with a lush green forested hillside and mountains in the background, situated along the coastline at Furry Creek in West Vancouver.

Georgia Court.description: A multi-story residential building with beige siding, large windows, and balconies, situated under a partly cloudy sky with leafless trees in front.

The Max.description: A tall, modern glass-clad skyscraper with protruding balconies and a curved exterior, situated on Max Beatty Street in Vancouver, with a leafless tree and a 7 Days Coffee shop at its base.

Apex.description: A modern high-rise building with a curved, glass facade and multiple balconies rises above the surrounding trees in a cityscape at sunset.

Rhythm.description: A modern, two-story building with large glass windows, wooden beams, and a sloped roof, situated next to a taller apartment building on a partly cloudy day.

Patina.description: A tall modern building with a rounded, glass exterior towers over historic stone and brick structures, surrounded by trees and parked cars in an urban setting.

Wall One.description: A tall, modern skyscraper with a sleek, curved design dominates the Vancouver skyline near Nelson Street, surrounded by other high-rise buildings and lush green trees under a partly cloudy sky.

Laguna Parkside.description: The image shows the entrance to the Laguna Parkside building at 1925 Alberni Street in Vancouver, with two small trees, colorful flower beds, and a modern glass and concrete façade.

Ingastown.description: A modern multi-story building with large glass windows and a dark exterior, located at 150 E Cordova Street in Vancouver, with pedestrians walking by and cars parked on the street during dusk or early evening.

Alberni By Kengo Kuma.description: The building designed by Kengo Kuma features an innovative, twisting architectural form with a facade of angled, layered elements, standing tall at the intersection of Alberni Street and Vancouver streets, surrounded by other modern high-rises.

Sophia Living.description: A multi-story residential building with beige and light green exterior siding, black roof, and large windows, situated at the corner of Elgin and Clarke Streets in Port Moody, with trees, a sidewalk, and a parked car nearby.

Country Woods/Hillview.description: A charming two-story house with three dormer windows and a front porch, surrounded by tall trees and lush greenery in a rural area of Surrey.

Crest.description: A modern, multi-story residential building with a combination of dark gray and light gray exterior siding, featuring large windows, small balconies with black railings, and a black picket fence along the front sidewalk.

Vantage.description: A modern multi-story building with gray and white siding, featuring balconies with black railings, is surrounded by greenery and trees, with a sign in front indicating the address as 6188 141 Street and additional signage for units for sale.

Springfield.description: A row of modern, multi-story townhouses with balconies and awnings, green trees in front, and a gray van parked on the street under a clear blue sky.

Palette On The Park.description: A two-story building with a welcoming front porch, surrounded by lush greenery and vibrant flower beds, has a blue sign indicating it is "Palette on the Park" located at 12711 64 Avenue in Surrey.

Altadena.description: A tall beige residential building with multiple balconies and large windows is situated on Burrard Street in Vancouver, with trees and storefronts at the street level.

Hyland Creek.description: A large, two-story house with a three-car garage, white siding, brick accents, a balcony above the garage, and a well-maintained front yard with green grass and red and green shrubs.

The Savoy.description: The exterior of a multi-story residential building with light-colored siding, a covered entrance, and surrounding planters, located at 12739 72 Avenue in Surrey.

failures.reason: The operation was aborted due to timeout
